# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service-a
  labels:
    app: direct-access-service-a
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: your-registry/direct-access-service-a:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: NETWORK_MODE
              value: direct
            - name: LOW_LATENCY
              value: "true"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service-b
  labels:
    app: direct-access-service-b
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: your-registry/direct-access-service-b:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
          env:
            - name: NETWORK_MODE
              value: direct
            - name: LOW_LATENCY
              value: "true"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service-c
  labels:
    app: direct-access-service-c
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: your-registry/direct-access-service-c:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 7070
          env:
            - name: NETWORK_MODE
              value: direct
            - name: LOW_LATENCY
              value: "true"
